---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve?

Describe the friction, limitation, or gap this feature would address.

## Proposed solution

Describe the behaviour you want. Be as specific as you can about inputs, outputs, and where the change should live (compiler core, extension, CLI, API, schema, etc.).

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about and why you prefer the proposed one.

## Relevant roadmap phase

If this maps to a planned phase in [`docs/08_ROADMAP.md`](../../docs/08_ROADMAP.md), note it here.

## Additional context

Any examples, mockups, or related issues that help explain the request.
